name: Kipper Pate Slices with Cucumber Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry to form a 25.5cm (10in) square.
2. Cut in half, then cut each piece lengthways to give 12 slices. Brush with beaten egg and place on a baking sheet.
3. Bake at 200°C (400°F) for mark 6 for about 10 minutes, or until risen and golden.
4. Meanwhile, mix together the pate, cream, and lemon juice. Season.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients to give the cucumber dressing a runny consistency, seasoning to taste.
6. Cool pastry on a wire rack, trim, and sandwich in pairs with pate.
7. Arrange on plates with dressing and garnish with lemon slices and cucumber.
8. Serve cold.
